free_text: Typed attachment grid (transposed layout, footer 'MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16'): field labels run down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Value of Asset buckets A: None through L: Over $50,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000; Type of Income: None/Dividends/Rent/Interest/Capital Gains/Excepted/Blind Trust/Tax-Deferred/Other Type of Income; Amount of Income: Current Year buckets A: None through K: Over $5,000,000 plus Spouse/DC Income over $1,000,000; Amount of Income: Preceding Year January 1, 2016 - December 31, 2016, same buckets). One asset per column; selections are black-filled cells. This page has a single asset column. EIF row is blank for this asset. Header: 'Name: Rohit Khanna', 'Page ___ of ___' (blank).
